nasb.text: Will you judge them, will you judge them, son of man? Make them know the abominations of their fathers;

esv.text: Will you judge them, son of man, will you judge them? Let them know the abominations of their fathers,

cnv.text: 人子啊，你要審問他們嗎？要審問他們嗎？你要使他們知道他們列祖那些可憎的事，

ccb.text: 人子啊，你要审判他们？你要审判他们？要使他们知道他们祖先所做的可憎之事。
